title: School Psychologists
description: Diagnose and implement individual or schoolwide interventions or strategies to address educational, behavioral, or developmental issues that adversely impact educational functioning in a school. May address student learning and behavioral problems and counsel students or families. May design and implement performance plans, and evaluate performance. May consult with other school-based personnel.

tasks.text: Compile and interpret students' test results, along with information from teachers and parents, to diagnose conditions and to help assess eligibility for special services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain student records, including special education reports, confidential records, records of services provided, and behavioral data.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Report any pertinent information to the proper authorities in cases of child endangerment, neglect, or abuse.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select, administer, and score psychological tests.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Interpret test results and prepare psychological reports for teachers, administrators, and parents.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assess an individual child's needs, limitations, and potential, using observation, review of school records, and consultation with parents and school personnel.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Develop individualized educational plans in collaboration with teachers and other staff members.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Counsel children and families to help solve conflicts and problems in learning and adjustment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collect and analyze data to evaluate the effectiveness of academic programs and other services, such as behavioral management systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide consultation to parents, teachers, administrators, and others on topics such as learning styles and behavior modification techniques.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with other educational professionals to develop teaching strategies and school programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design classes and programs to meet the needs of special students.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Promote an understanding of child development and its relationship to learning and behavior.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend workshops, seminars, or professional meetings to remain informed of new developments in school psychology.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Refer students and their families to appropriate community agencies for medical, vocational, or social services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Serve as a resource to help families and schools deal with crises, such as separation and loss.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Initiate and direct efforts to foster tolerance, understanding, and appreciation of diversity in school communities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide educational programs on topics such as classroom management, teaching strategies, or parenting skills.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct research to generate new knowledge that can be used to address learning and behavior issues.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
